title: Stupid Block Animations
body:
![Stupid Block Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80abf7a588eda9de6c7f01c46831aea78f5f81cb.png)

**Stupid Block Animations** is a client-side Fabric mod that adds **smooth placement and breaking animations** to Minecraft blocks. When placing or mining blocks, they slightly **tilt and wobble**, giving interactions with the world a more dynamic and satisfying feel
The mod is **fully client-side** and compatible with **Sodium**!!

[![join my tg channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dda5aef60f5a12da1753f577f55952cabe61bd9.gif)](https://t.me/fenny0I3)
---

## Features

### Block Placement Animations

When placing a block, it briefly **tilts and settles into place**.

The animation depends on the **face of the block you interact with**, so blocks will rotate differently when placed:

- on the ground
- on walls
- under ceilings

This makes building feel more natural and visually satisfying.

---

### Block Breaking Animations

When you start mining a block, it begins to **wobble slightly**, providing visual feedback during breaking

The animation includes several stages:

1. small delay before the motion begins
2. oscillating movement while the block is being mined
3. short hold at the maximum tilt
4. smooth return to the original position

---

### Support for Multi-Block Structures

The mod properly handles blocks that consist of multiple parts

Supported blocks include:
- Beds
- Doors
- Banners

All connected parts animate **synchronously**, ensuring natural-looking motion

---

### Fully Configurable

The mod includes an in-game configuration menu with **live animation previews**

You can adjust:

#### Placement Animation

- Enable / disable animation
- Animation duration
- Maximum rotation angles
- Oscillation cycles
- Easing type
- Randomized rotation direction

#### Breaking Animation

- Enable / disable animation
- Delay before the animation starts
- Oscillation speed
- Maximum angles
- Easing type
- Return duration
- Animation for connected blocks
